allow: PowerShell(python -c "import sys, json; from graphify.extract import collect_files, extract; from pathlib import Path; detect = json.loads\(open\('.graphify_detect.json'\).read_text\(\)\); code_files = []; [code_files.extend\(collect_files\(Path\(f\)\) if Path\(f\).is_dir\(\) else [Path\(f\)]\) for f in detect.get\('files', {}\).get\('code', []\)]; result = extract\(code_files\) if code_files else {'nodes':[], 'edges':[]}; Path\('.graphify_ast.json'\).write_text\(json.dumps\(result, indent=2\)\); print\('AST: ' + str\(len\(result['nodes']\)\) + ' nodes, ' + str\(len\(result['edges']\)\) + ' edges'\)")
